description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs for April 16 session

market_regime.label: BLOCKADE_ESCALATION_STABILIZED
market_regime.key_risk: Iran outreach to Trump (April 14) — no formal deal yet. Blockade STILL ACTIVE. April 22 deadline = 7 days. Iran outreach creates optimism but IRGC could still act independently.
market_regime.dominant_risk: Iran IRGC "last warning" not formally retracted. Outreach by Iranian diplomats ≠ IRGC operational stand-down. Any Hormuz incident (mine, seizure, missile) overrides diplomatic signal.
market_regime.regime_note: April 15 morning: Regime STABILIZED from full BLOCKADE_ESCALATION. On April 14 (Indian holiday), Brent fell $4.76 to $97.50 as Trump said Iran called wanting negotiations. No formal deal. Blockade in effect. April 22 deadline = 7 days remaining. Nifty opened gap-down ~-0.25% at 23,772 (much less than -0.8% forecast — Iran outreach absorbed bearish pressure). Session forecast: FLAT_TO_SIDEWAYS_UP. Key watch: Any formal Iran-US talks announcement = RELIEF RALLY trigger.
